category_sources: source_facts.description says LastPass command-line interface tool; official manpage describes lpass as a CLI for LastPass.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is LastPass CLI; source_facts.name is lastpass-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to the online manpage as full documentation; repository README is the official project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/lastpass/lastpass-cli, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official lpass manpage identify LastPass vault operations through a command-line interface.
